{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231943470EC66C7E7F383A9EF0C0"}"},"total":95},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7558440964409672473","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个小说还可以，但是感觉逻辑不是很强，而且主要在写龙国的天选者，没有其他对比的感觉，就是嗯，很平淡的一种推进，但是还是给了五星，支持一下作者吧[吃瓜][吃瓜]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759838304,"group_id":"7553583612386364478","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9nUXjvpYH6xE2Wo9bjTKGy6BkwT6ZMPC9Nbcj68lXuK","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c84774a907a24915adb8f23dadcd9714~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793978&x-signature=gurmvriIwtyyfKRU1wFg6I%2FlIu0%3D","user_id":"2787997684873950","user_name":"念意鸭"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2787997684873950","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7553583612386364478","book_info":{"abstract":"名为【童话镇】的恐怖副本成为悬在全人类头上的利剑。各国天选者进入其中，一旦失败，对应的童话诡异将在现实降临。
继龙国最后的王牌天选者在【白雪公主】副本中陨落，龙国即将面临灭国之灾。
绝望之际，新的天选者苏铭被选中，一个刚刚失业的动画原画师。
当全球直播开启，看到那熟悉的三角奶酪墙洞、红色狗屋和永无止境的追逐时，所有人都懵了。
这是全球最高死亡率、号称“无解循环”的SS级副本——【永恒的追逐】！
然而，苏铭看着眼前那只穿着女仆装的二足直立黑猫，和那只悠闲品着咖啡的小老鼠，彻底傻眼。
这不就是《猫和老鼠》吗？！
别人眼中无解的恐怖循环，在他这个逐帧分析过上百集的老动画人眼里，全是漏洞！
“规则说永远不能伤害杰瑞？你们不知道汤姆有9条命可以用来试错吗？”
“斗牛犬斯派克的规则列表有一米长？但他儿子泰克就是他唯一的开关！”
“女主人两只脚从不露脸，被誉为最神秘的规则具象体？我知道她最怕什么！”
当别的天选者还在为一块发霉的面包挣扎时，苏铭已经开始利用各种经典道具（捕鼠夹、炸药、隐身药水）反向戏耍起了童话镇的诡异生物。
“你们扮演的是求生者，而我，要扮演汤姆。”
“我的童年回忆，好像有点不对劲，但又好像……完全对上了？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/77954a5470abbb61e34e8dd0d39243d6","author":"一个猪脚三碗饭","author_id":"","book_id":"7553583612386364478","book_name":"规则怪谈：从汤姆有亿点强开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1807人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7553584056428921406","read_count":"1807","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"430304"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.9","serial_count":"189","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,直播,灵异,规则怪谈,惊悚游戏,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b4bb2634c1e3ace94673e2560c1b47f7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450227&x-signature=997jlEsUlBL41S7SW3vrhoGECrc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"59031180645","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"57"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231943470EC66C7E7F383A9EF0C0"}"},"relate_info_l ist":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读49分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2921,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3000},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607674144473891608","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的非常好，非常有意思，可惜的是只有三个故事就完结了。汤姆猫开局能玩出花来确实处处是意外时时有惊喜，比起同类型我看过的尖锐与沉重主色调来说，它更像是回到童年的一场冒险。又想回去看猫和老鼠了，哈哈。在规则怪谈系列里合作的底色会贯穿人类与可争取NPC的并不多，更难有完整的作为“人”的尊重，期待作者写更多更有意思的新书。","text_exts":[{"e":93,"s":89,"text":"猫和老鼠","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%8C%AB%E5%92%8C%E8%80%81%E9%BC%A0&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742662273A9EF0C0%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227607674144473891608%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227553583612386364478%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%8C%AB%E5%92%8C%E8%80%81%E9%BC%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":105,"s":99,"text":"规则怪谈系列","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%E7%B3%BB%E5%88%97&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742662273A9EF0C0%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227607674144473891608%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227553583612386364478%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%E7%B3%BB%E5%88%97%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771303635,"group_id":"7553583612386364478","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info"
